continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Hidden Inventory and Premature Death manga pre-mainline material.

content.fact: Toji Fushiguro's physical anomaly and tactical preparation let him disrupt assumptions that elite sorcerers can simply overpower the mission threat.
content.injection: Once Toji enters the Context, write him as a specialized anti-sorcerer threat whose danger comes from preparation, physicality, and unusual cursed-energy assumptions.
constraints: Avoid later Megumi-family fallout unless a later deck is active.
antiLore: Do not frame Toji as just another curse user with ordinary cursed technique pressure.

sourceInfo.title: Hidden Inventory
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Q And Time Vessel Association Create Mission Pressure

context.label: External groups pressure the escort mission

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Hidden Inventory and Premature Death manga pre-mainline material.

content.fact: The Star Plasma Vessel mission has factional pressure from Q and the Time Vessel Association, making the escort politically and ideologically exposed.
content.injection: During the Riko escort, use Q and Time Vessel Association pressure as mission context when opposition groups or bounty pressure matter.
constraints: Keep this pressure local to the Hidden Inventory mission unless later decks explicitly connect the aftermath.
antiLore: Do not make the escort conflict only a personal duel between Gojo, Geto, and Toji.

sourceInfo.title: Hidden Inventory
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Gojo's Awakened RCT Changes His Power Ceiling

context.label: Gojo after reverse cursed technique awakening

coordinates.label: Gojo has awakened reverse cursed technique

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Hidden Inventory and Premature Death manga pre-mainline material.

content.fact: After Toji pushes him past his prior limit, Gojo's reverse cursed technique awakening changes his personal power ceiling and the meaning of his later strength.
content.injection: After the RCT awakening anchor, write Gojo with a qualitatively changed power ceiling; before it, keep him brilliant but not yet at that post-awakening state.
constraints: Do not use later adult Gojo feats as automatic Hidden Inventory capabilities unless this anchor has passed and the deck stack supports them.
antiLore: Do not give pre-awakening student Gojo the same practical capability profile as post-awakening Gojo.

sourceInfo.title: Hidden Inventory
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: Riko's Death Breaks The Star Plasma Mission

context.label: After Riko's death and mission collapse

coordinates.label: Star Plasma Vessel mission has collapsed

continuity.sourceBoundary: Jujutsu Kaisen Hidden Inventory and Premature Death manga pre-mainline material.

content.fact: Riko Amanai's death breaks the Star Plasma Vessel mission and leaves Gojo and Geto with different scars from the failed protection.
content.injection: After the collapse anchor, let Riko's death and the failed mission weigh on Gojo and Geto rather than treating the escort as a completed success.
constraints: Do not leak later Shibuya or Culling Game Tengen implications from this pre-mainline card.
antiLore: Do not write the mission as if Riko merged with Tengen successfully.
